steps.name: approval-and-host-preflight
steps.summary: Confirmed approval boundary and completed local preflight: npm run test, lint, typecheck, build, and docker compose config passed without running ssh oci.

steps.name: server-compose-runtime
steps.summary: Prepared the server-local H-Log Compose bundle on the approved OCI host and verified remote docker compose config/ps. Compose services are hlog-nginx, hlog-web, hlog-postgres, and hlog-redis; config publishes only Nginx ingress and no services were started or restarted.

steps.name: nginx-domain-tls-smoke
steps.summary: Approved docker compose up -d completed on OCI and local Nginx smoke passed through localhost:8080: public routes returned 200, /projects returned 307 to the portfolio surface, and /admin plus /api/internal/smoke returned 404. Production domain/TLS and 80/443 public smoke are intentionally deferred to the domain purchase/production cutover step; Cloudflare or equivalent edge access control must default-block admin/internal routes except approved IPs or a trusted zone.

steps.name: backup-restore-deploy-smoke
steps.summary: Completed Step 3 local and OCI checks: npm run test, lint, typecheck, build, and docker compose config passed; OCI Compose runtime was started after it was found stopped, containers became healthy, localhost:8080 route/header smoke passed, admin/internal routes returned 404, phase-gated crawler routes returned expected 404, PostgreSQL/Redis host ports were not published, a server-local logical dump was created, and an isolated pgvector restore rehearsal from that dump succeeded. Migration and content_hash DB-table checks are not applicable until a real migration runner/DB adapter exists; rollback was not executed and remains explicit-approval-only.
